description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows on several sides allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house is situated on a paved lot with multiple parking spaces and is surrounded by several medium-sized leafy trees, providing a touch of greenery. The front facade features a set of three windows and a main entry door, while the rear and side facades have a mix of window sizes and placements. The property includes a driveway and a walkway leading to the entrance, with cars parked in designated spots. The overall aesthetic is clean, functional, and contemporary, suitable for an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a paved lot with parking and surrounding trees. The design is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, three windows, and cars parked along the paved driveway with trees on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting large windows, three trees along the facade, and two cars parked near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide paved area, three large windows, a glass door, and cars parked in front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a row of windows, two cars parked, and a clear view of the flat roof and open lot.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flush with the facade, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance
